abort.no_url_available: No authorization URL available. Make sure Home Assistant is reachable, or enable My Home Assistant.
abort.oauth_error: The OAuth server returned an invalid token.
abort.oauth_failed: Failed to fetch the OAuth token.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timed out while fetching the OAuth token.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The Beatbot account does not match the account that needs to be re-authenticated.
abort.unknown_region: The Beatbot account did not report a supported region. Make sure the account is provisioned for a supported region (cn, na, eu) and try again.

auth.description: Follow the link to log in to Beatbot and authorize Home Assistant to access your devices.
auth.title: Authorize Beatbot Account

reauth_confirm.description: The Beatbot integration needs to re-authenticate your account.
reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]

control_connection_error.message: Failed to control {device} because the Beatbot server could not be reached.
